post.description: Retrieve automated pricing rules (autopilot) that dynamically adjust flight prices. Filter by country pair and airline to see which autopilot rules are active. Use when someone asks about 'autopilot rules', 'automated pricing', or 'dynamic pricing config' for a specific market.

data.description: Request parameters for loading autopilot rules

profileName.description: Country code (ISO 2-letter) that identifies the rule set. E.g. ID (Indonesia), TH (Thailand), VN (Vietnam), SG (Singapore), MY (Malaysia), PH (Philippines)

currency.description: Currency code for the country. E.g. IDR (Indonesia), THB (Thailand), VND (Vietnam), SGD (Singapore), MYR (Malaysia), PHP (Philippines)

post.summary: Update autopilot pricing rules (create/modify rules with conditions and adjustments)

data.description: Request payload for updating autopilot rules. Must include the full autopilotToolData from load-rules response with modifications, plus version for optimistic locking.

autopilotToolData.description: The full autopilot document. Get this from load-rules response, modify rules as needed, then pass back.

rules.description: Array of autopilot rules. Each rule has conditions, adjustmentDefault, and optional adjustmentFallback.

conditions.description: Rule conditions (routes, airlines, etc). Preserve from load-rules response.

adjustmentFallback.description: Fallback adjustment when scraping data unavailable

version.description: Optimistic lock version from load-rules response. MUST match current version or update will be rejected.

notes.description: Change notes describing what was modified

approvalRequester.description: Email of the person requesting approval (optional)

post.description: Retrieve baseline markup/margin rules that define the base price adjustment for flights. These are the foundational pricing rules before any dynamic or promotional adjustments. Use when someone asks about 'baseline markup', 'base margin', 'default pricing rules', or 'how much markup do we add'.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

airlineId.description: IATA airline code, e.g. GA, SQ, QZ

post.description: Retrieve bundling pricing rules that define how bundled products (flight + hotel, flight + insurance) are priced. Use when someone asks about 'bundle pricing', 'bundling rules', or 'package deal pricing config'.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.description: Retrieve anchor fare and price prediction rules used for dynamic pricing. These rules define how the system predicts fare trends and sets anchor prices. Use when someone asks about 'price prediction', 'anchor fare rules', 'dynamic pricing prediction', or 'fare forecast config'.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.summary: Load Price Cut / Promo Modifier Rules
post.description: Retrieve price cut and promotional modifier rules. These define temporary price reductions, flash sales, and promotional adjustments. Use when someone asks about 'price cut rules', 'promo modifiers', 'discount config', or 'flash sale pricing'.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.description: Retrieve transaction/service fee rules. These define additional fees charged on top of the base fare (e.g. booking fee, service charge). Use when someone asks about 'transaction fees', 'service fees', 'booking charges', or 'trx fee config'.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.description: Retrieve ticket issuance fee rules. These define fees charged for issuing airline tickets through different providers. Use when someone asks about 'issuance fees', 'ticketing fees', 'ticket issuance charges', or 'issuance fee config'.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.description: List all available pricing profile names. Pricing profiles group pricing rules by business context (e.g. default, promo, enterprise). Use when someone asks 'what pricing profiles exist' or needs profile names for further queries.

data.description: Request data payload (tool-specific parameters go here)

post.description: Load reusable filter condition groups. Condition groups define sets of criteria (routes, airlines, dates) that can be shared across pricing rules. Use when someone asks about 'condition groups', 'filter conditions', 'reusable conditions', or 'what conditions are defined'. Keywords: condition groups, filter criteria, reusable filters.

post.description: Retrieve commission rate rules for airline partners. Defines how much commission Traveloka receives per ticket from each airline. Use when someone asks about 'commission rates', 'airline commission', 'incentive rules for SQ', or 'partner commission config'.

airlineId.description: IATA airline code to filter commission rules, e.g. GA, SQ, QZ

post.description: Retrieve volume-based tiered incentive rules. These define bonus commission tiers based on booking volume (e.g. sell 100+ tickets = extra 2% commission). Use when someone asks about 'tiered incentives', 'volume bonuses', 'tier-based commission', or 'incentive tiers for a brand'.

post.summary: Check Tiered Incentive Progress for a Booking
post.description: Check the tiered incentive progress for a specific booking by its PNR code. Shows which incentive tier the booking falls into and how much bonus was earned. Use when someone asks 'check incentive for PNR ABC123', 'tiered progress for a booking', or 'did this booking qualify for bonus commission'.

post.description: Check the remaining and used budget balance for pricing operations. Returns how much budget is left and how much has been consumed. Use when someone asks 'how much budget is left', 'budget remaining for IDR', or 'pricing budget status'.
